title: Ithu Pol Ithu Pol Lyrics 8 Thottakkal
stanzas:
Ithu Pol Ithu Pol Song Lyrics 8 Thottakkal
#KuttyRevathi @dsathyaprakash

Idhu pol idhupol
inimelum vaaraathaa
kanavum kanavum
nijamaaga neelaathaa

idhu podhum podhume..
ini sogam theerume
pothu vaasam veesuthe
idhu podhum podhume..

peru megam vaanile
siru saaral kannile
peranbu thonuthe
ithu podhum podhume..

pesakooda aalillaamal
aayulthaan ponathu
aasai koodi aanaimeeri
kaalgalthaan poguthu

mudhalmurai vaanam
paarkiren
nilavudan kooda pogiren
ivaludan poga poga
pesa pesa paadhai neelaathaa

idhu podhum podhume..
ini sogam theerume
pothu vaasam veesuthe
idhu podhum podhume..

peru megam vaanile
siru saaral kannile
peranbu thonuthe
ithu podhum podhume..

Idhu pol idhupol
inimelum thaaraayaa
medhuvaai melithaai
udaipola aavaayaa

thanimai siraiyil
thavam pol kidanthen
kathavai thirandhaai
oliyaal vizhiththaen

idhu podhum podhume..
idhu podhum podhume..
idhu podhum podhume..
idhu podhum podhume..(2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Ithu Pol Ithu Pol?

The song explores themes of longing and introspection, capturing a melancholic yet soothing vibe.

Who is the singer of Ithu Pol Ithu Pol?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash, known for his soulful voice.

Who composed the music for 8 Thottakkal?

The music for the movie was composed by Sundaramurthy KS.

What is the release year of 8 Thottakkal?

The movie was released in 2017.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song underscores the emotional journey of the characters, adding depth to the narrative.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ithu Pol Ithu Pol from 8 Thottakkal is a beautifully composed melody that delves into themes of longing and introspection. Sung by Sathya Prakash, the song's soothing tune and poignant lyrics by Kutti Revathi evoke a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. It captures the emotional turmoil of the characters, enhancing the film's narrative depth. The music by Sundaramurthy KS perfectly complements the reflective mood, making it a memorable piece for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful melody of Ithu Pol Ithu Pol from the movie 8 Thottakkal, where Sathya Prakash's evocative vocals blend seamlessly with Sundaramurthy KS's soothing composition. This song, penned by Kutti Revathi, captures the essence of longing and introspection. Dive into a world of emotions with this beautifully crafted piece.
stanzaMeanings: Will dreams like these never come again? Will dreams never become real?
The heart is fluttering somewhere, something is moving in life and feelings.
This is enough, it's enough... now the sadness will end, the breeze is blowing, this is enough, it's enough...
The big cloud in the sky, the small drizzle in the eyes, love is felt, this is enough, it's enough...
Without anyone to talk to, life has passed by, desires are growing, legs are moving like an elephant's.
For the first time, I'm seeing the sky, going with the moon, as we go and talk, the path doesn't end.
This is enough, it's enough... now the sadness will end, the breeze is blowing, this is enough, it's enough...
The big cloud in the sky, the small drizzle in the eyes, love is felt, this is enough, it's enough...
Will things like this come again? Will you gently break like a shell?
I was lying in solitude like a penance, you opened the door, I woke up with the sound.
This is enough, it's enough... this is enough, it's enough... this is enough, it's enough... this is enough, it's enough...
